title: Italian Cannellini Dip
ingredients: 1 (15-ounce) can cannellini beans, drained and rinsed
1/4 cup (loosely packed) fresh Italian parsley leaves
instructions: Place cannellini beans, garlic, lemon juice, olive oil, and Italian parsley leaves in a food processor.
Add salt and pepper to taste.
Serve with pita chips and veggies.
